features: Motion Flex Technology: A suite of advancements in invisible speaker engineering for unparalleled acoustic performance from an invisible speaker
Air Flex Woofer: Glass-fibre woofer coupled to an acoustically inert diaphragm to move a pocket of air like a piston for robust and powerful bass.

Constant Directivity Crossover (CDX): The proprietary Sonance CDX provides uniquely smooth off-axis frequency response for greater fidelity and coverage and almost 180°of horizontal and vertical dispersion.
